name: california-santa-cruz
description: Santa Cruz County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Santa Cruz County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Santa Cruz County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Santa Cruz County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Santa Cruz County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Santa Cruz County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-santa-cruz-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-santa-cruz-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The HTML body contains only an error message: 'Sorry - an unhandled error occured. Please try again later.'
No table rows, list items, or data containers are present to extract representative information.
No image tags or photo elements exist to extract photoUrl.
No links or anchor tags are present to extract detailUrl.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Santa Cruz County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Santa Cruz County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Santa Cruz County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Santa Cruz County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
